https://prismic-io.s3.amazonaws.com/boldradius/63367a5a6d01402964a46cc16010b9ea3a64456e_scala-dehs-2.png

Join your fellow Canadians for a great night of networking and discussions. Drinks and appetizers will be provided by event sponsors BoldRadius and Hootsuite. We look forward to seeing you there!
event.title: Scala D'EHs - An Event for Canadians at Scala Days 2015
